completion_checks.name: untracked_file_resolution
confirmed_facts: the untracked file was removed from the active working scope
the working tree became clean after the archive move
completion_checks.interpretation: Phase8 successfully resolved the lingering out-of-scope file risk without mixing it into orchestrator scope.

completion_checks.name: operational_template_canonicalization
confirmed_facts: session-35 created four operational templates under docs/templates
session-35 created docs/AI_DEVELOPMENT_SOP.md as the canonical SOP document
the templates cover pre-flight, target-branch, execution, and review phases
completion_checks.interpretation: Phase8 established a reusable operational entry and review layer that captures the main lessons from Phase6 and Phase7.

completion_checks.name: single_source_of_truth_repair
confirmed_facts: session-35a removed the duplicate SOP from docs/templates
docs/AI_DEVELOPMENT_SOP.md remains as the single source of truth
the duplication risk introduced during session-35 was corrected
completion_checks.interpretation: Phase8 restored canonical document ownership and prevented future SOP drift.

completion_checks.name: cross_report_consistency_validation
confirmed_facts: the new tests validate report JSON objects, final_judgement structure, status enum consistency, and next_phase naming consistency
pytest, ruff, mypy, and compileall all passed
completion_checks.interpretation: Phase8 extended the validation layer from single-report schema checks to cross-report consistency checks, confirming stronger operational reproducibility.

evidence_summary.archive_outcome: The previously lingering untracked media-os profile spec was archived out of the orchestrator scope.
evidence_summary.template_outcome: Operational templates and a canonical SOP were established and then deduplicated to a single source of truth.
evidence_summary.validation_outcome: Cross-report consistency testing was added on top of existing single-report schema validation.
evidence_summary.overall_assessment: Phase8 achieved its purpose of stabilizing operational templates, closing scope hygiene issues, and strengthening validation at the report-system level.

risks: The new operational templates are docs-only controls and still depend on human adherence during session execution.
Cross-report consistency tests may require maintenance if future report families introduce intentionally different final_judgement or next_phase conventions.

final_judgement.reason: Phase8 completed the intended scope of operational template standardization, scope hygiene cleanup, and cross-report validation strengthening without leaving blocking issues.
